tasks.title: Initialize durable project memory system
tasks.description: Create the canonical JSON-based memory system in docs/project-memory and seed it with verified project state.
tasks.notes: Completed during memory-system initialization and versioned in git.

tasks.title: Maintain project memory on every future session
tasks.description: Read docs/project-memory at session start and write back durable learnings, status changes, and tasks before session end.
tasks.notes: Core operating rule requested by the user.

tasks.title: Continue home-page visual polish
tasks.description: Keep refining the home hero and other dense sections until the user confirms the presentation feels investor-grade.
tasks.notes: User feedback explicitly flagged home-page text quality; the hero was rebuilt into a simpler stacked composition and now needs live user validation.

tasks.title: Build tighter investor funnel
tasks.description: Add a stronger capital-partner conversion flow, likely including gated deck/data-room request handling and a more polished inquiry sequence.
tasks.notes: Previously discussed as a likely next feature area.

tasks.title: Connect live impact metrics
tasks.description: Replace planning-stage placeholders with real data sources, calculators, or dashboard-driven metrics when the data model is ready.
tasks.notes: Current impact metrics are intentionally placeholder-oriented.

tasks.title: Expand authority-content system
tasks.description: Develop the news, policy, and resource areas into a durable authority-building content engine.
tasks.notes: Architecture is prepared, but full content systems are not built yet.

tasks.title: Build lead-management/admin layer
tasks.description: Add internal tooling or dashboards for reviewing, qualifying, and managing inbound leads stored in Supabase.
tasks.notes: Lead capture exists, but no admin UI is in the repo yet.

tasks.title: Configure live SMTP credentials for lead notifications
tasks.description: Set SMTP credentials and sender identity in local env and Vercel so successful lead submissions also notify warephoto@yahoo.com.
tasks.notes: Yahoo SMTP values are prefilled, but two supplied credentials have now failed auth. Remaining blocker is a valid Yahoo app password or a switch to another provider.

tasks.title: Document and follow QA workflow for build and typecheck
tasks.description: Keep the verified build/typecheck sequence explicit so future sessions do not misinterpret .next/types timing failures.
tasks.notes: Run build before an isolated typecheck or rerun typecheck after build output exists.
